text.title: Quality Gates and Confidence Checks Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply Quality Gates and Confidence Checks end-to-end. Each step names its input, action, and output.

step.name: enumerate-phases
step.action: List the phases that need promotion gates.

step.name: define-gates
step.action: For each phase pick which of L1..L6 apply and set threshold.

step.name: assign-owners
step.action: Name the human or agent owner per gate.

step.name: instrument
step.action: Wire each gate to its evidence source (CI, test runner, reviewer).

step.name: emit-report
step.action: Author quality-gates report JSON; validate with scripts/validate-quality-gates-confidence.py.
